title: Move directory, docker and openshift from cmd/skopeo to their own subpackages
body:
Does not change behavior.  This is a straightforward move and update of package references, except for:
- Adding a duplicate definition of `manifestSchema1` to `cmd/skopeo/copy.go`.  This will need to be cleaned up later, for now preferring to make no design changes in this commit.
- Renaming `parseDockerImage` to `NewDockerImage`, to both make it public and consistent with common golang conventions.

comments.body: Submitting this as a separate PR so that we have a hopefully uncontroversial base to further discuss the API on.
Awesome, this is basically like my previous pr but doesn't change any logic (iiuc)
